data.content: Implemented beads-state-machine.ts with nextBeat() and claimBeat(). nextBeat loads beat, verifies expectedState, computes forward transition via forwardTransitionTarget(), updates via getBackend().update(). claimBeat verifies queued+claimable, transitions to active. Error messages include 'expected state' and 'currently' for isExpectedStateMismatchError() compat. 14 tests added. All quality gates pass.
